name: Corvin Batch Compute
description: Enables 50% cost reduction for L25 prompt-sweep compute jobs with 100+ candidates by routing them through the Anthropic Message Batches API instead of real-time inference. Results arrive within 1-24 hours. Only suitable for non-interactive, latency-tolerant workloads. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in vault. L34 compliance: max classification INTERNAL (never CONFIDENTIAL/SECRET).
